---

## IMPORTANT NOTES

- These procedures apply to BU HOME games only
- Away game field setup is the responsibility of the home team
- When in doubt about a specific field's procedures, check
  the BU Manager site or ask in BU Manager Slack
- Procedures are consistent season to season but verify
  any changes at the start of each new season

---

## CARLMONT HIGH SCHOOL
**Location:** Belmont, CA
**Field:** Stadium turf field (11v11)
**Storage:** BU equipment stored at Barrett Park, San Mateo

---

### EQUIPMENT OVERVIEW

#### Corner Flags:
- Stored in BU storage box at Barrett Park
- First team of Saturday picks up flags from Barrett
- First team of Sunday picks up flags from Barrett
- Last team of the weekend returns flags to Barrett

#### Goals:
- Goals are set up on the stadium field
- Goals remain on the field between Saturday and Sunday
- Goals are moved off the field only at end of weekend
  (see Full Weekend Breakdown below)

#### Benches:
- Benches remain in place between Saturday and Sunday
- Benches are moved only at end of weekend
  (see Full Weekend Breakdown below)

---

### SATURDAY PROCEDURES

#### First Game of Saturday - Full Setup:
The manager of the first BU game on Saturday is responsible for:
1. 🚗 Travel to Barrett Park and retrieve corner flags 
   from BU storage box
   - Allow ~10 min travel time from Carlmont to Barrett
   - Pick up flags BEFORE arriving at Carlmont
   - Lock codes: https://belmontunited.net/managers/
2. ⚽ Set up goals on stadium field
3. 🚩 Place corner flags on field
4. 📋 Set up team bench area, water, medical kit
5. Arrive at least 60-75 min before game time to allow 
   for Barrett trip and full setup

#### Between Saturday Games - Handoff:
When one game ends and another begins on the same Saturday:

**SHORT GAP (under 30 minutes between games):**
- Outgoing manager: Clear own team equipment only
  (bench supplies, water coolers, medical kit, team gear)
- Outgoing manager: Hand corner flags directly to 
  incoming manager
- Leave goals and corner flags in place on field
- Incoming manager takes over field responsibility

**LONG GAP (over 30 minutes between games) OR
NO FOLLOWING GAME CONFIRMED:**
- Outgoing manager must either:
  a) Coordinate explicitly with next team's manager BEFORE 
     game day to confirm handoff - get confirmation in writing
  b) Return corner flags to Barrett Park if no handoff 
     can be confirmed
- Leave goals in place (goals stay on field all weekend)
- ⚠️ Do not assume next team will handle flags without 
  explicit prior confirmation

#### Last Game of Saturday - End of Day:
The manager of the last BU game on Saturday is responsible for:
1. 🚗 Return corner flags to Barrett Park BU storage box
2. ⚽ Leave goals on field (goals stay for Sunday games)
3. 🪑 Leave benches in place (benches stay for Sunday games)
4. Clear all team equipment from field

---

### SUNDAY PROCEDURES

#### First Game of Sunday - Setup:
The manager of the first BU game on Sunday is responsible for:
1. 🚗 Travel to Barrett Park and retrieve corner flags
   from BU storage box
   - Goals should already be set up from Saturday
   - Verify goals are in correct position
   - Lock codes: https://belmontunited.net/managers/
2. 🚩 Place corner flags on field
3. 📋 Set up team bench area, water, medical kit

#### Between Sunday Games - Handoff:
Same handoff rules as Saturday apply:
- SHORT GAP: Hand flags directly to incoming manager
- LONG GAP or NO FOLLOWING GAME: Coordinate in advance
  or return flags to Barrett

#### Last Game of the Weekend - Full Breakdown:
The manager of the LAST BU game of the entire weekend
(typically the last Sunday game) is responsible for 
FULL BREAKDOWN:

1. 🚗 Return corner flags to Barrett Park BU storage box
2. ⚽ Move goals OFF the playing field
   - Move goals to the SCOREBOARD END of the field
3. 🪑 Move ALL benches:
   - Move benches INSIDE the track
   - Place at the edge of the turf (off the track)
4. Clear all team equipment from field

⚠️ This full breakdown is critical - leaving goals and 
benches on the field creates problems for other users 
of the facility. The last team's manager is responsible 
for ensuring this is completed.

---

### CARLMONT - MANAGER COORDINATION TIPS

#### Before Game Day:
- Check the full schedule of BU games at Carlmont that day
  (use assistant to identify all BU games at this location)
- Identify who is before you (if anyone) - confirm handoff
- Identify who is after you (if anyone) - confirm handoff
- If you are first: plan Barrett Park flag pickup into 
  your arrival time
- If you are last of weekend: plan for full breakdown

#### Day of Game:
- Exchange phone numbers with adjacent game managers
- Confirm handoff timing when previous game ends
- Don't leave until next manager has physically taken 
  the flags

#### Common Mistakes to Avoid:
- ❌ Assuming someone else got the flags from Barrett
- ❌ Leaving without confirming flag handoff to next team
- ❌ Skipping full weekend breakdown (goals + benches)
- ❌ Forgetting Barrett Park trip adds ~20 min round trip
  to your pre-game arrival time

## GENERAL FIELD PROCEDURE PRINCIPLES

These principles apply to ALL BU home fields:

### Setup Responsibility:
- The FIRST BU team of the day at a field is responsible 
  for full setup (goals, flags, bench areas)
- Plan arrival time to account for:
  * Flag/equipment pickup if storage is off-site
  * Full setup time (~30-45 min)
  * Coach warmup time after setup

### Handoff Responsibility:
- When your game ends and another BU game follows:
  * SHORT GAP (<30 min): Hand off flags directly
  * LONG GAP (>30 min): Coordinate in advance or break down
- Never leave a field without confirming the next team 
  has taken responsibility

### Breakdown Responsibility:
- The LAST BU team of the day handles field breakdown
- The LAST BU team of the WEEKEND handles full breakdown
  including moving goals and benches (field-specific 
  instructions above)

### Communication:
- Get the adjacent game managers' phone numbers before game day
- Confirm handoff plans before arriving at the field
- If plans change, notify adjacent managers immediately
- Use BU Manager Slack for broader coordination questions

### When Procedures Are Unclear:
1. Check this file first
2. Check BU Manager site: https://belmontunited.
